emails.subject: Re: Deal # 549052
emails.body: Re: Deal 549052 Sean Crandall changed the term of it during last night's checkout with Prebon, but forgot to change the strip in the deal. It's fixed now to reflect a term of 3/15 to 3/31. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 03/14/2001 06:53 AM
